name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the token collection.

totalSupply.title: Total Supply
totalSupply.description: Total number of tokens in existence.

balanceOf.title: Balance
balanceOf.description: Check how many tokens an address owns.

ownerOf.title: Owner
ownerOf.description: Look up the current owner of a specific token.

tokenURI.title: Token URI
tokenURI.description: Returns the metadata URI for a specific token.

approve.title: Approve
approve.description: Approve an address to transfer a specific token on your behalf.

getApproved.title: Get Approved
getApproved.description: Check which address is approved to transfer a specific token.

setApprovalForAll.title: Set Approval for All
setApprovalForAll.description: Approve or revoke an operator to manage all your tokens.
setApprovalForAll.warning: Grants full control over all your tokens in this collection to this operator.

isApprovedForAll.title: Is Approved for All
isApprovedForAll.description: Check whether an operator is approved to manage all tokens for an owner.

transferFrom.title: Transfer
transferFrom.description: Transfer a token to another address.

safeTransferFrom.title: Safe Transfer
safeTransferFrom.description: Transfer a token to another address, reverting if the recipient cannot receive ERC-721 tokens.

Transfer.description: Emitted when a token is transferred.

Approval.description: Emitted when an approval is set for a specific token.

ApprovalForAll.description: Emitted when an operator is approved or revoked for all tokens.
